lock.title: QRL Web3 Wallet
lock.unlock.title: Unlock Wallet
lock.unlock.description: Unlock the wallet with your password
lock.unlock.errorFailed: Failed to unlock wallet. Please try again.
welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Let's start using the QRL Web3 Wallet
onboarding.password.title: Set Wallet Password
onboarding.password.description: Set a password for this wallet
onboarding.password.validationMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters
onboarding.account.title: Add/Import account
onboarding.account.description: You can either add a new account, or import an existing account using your mnemonic phrases.
onboarding.account.recoveryDescription: Don't lose this recovery mnemonic phrases. Download it right now. You may need this someday to import or recover your account.
onboarding.account.recoveryWarning: It is highly recommended that you continue after downloading the recovery mnemonic phrases. If you already have, please continue.
onboarding.account.continueDialogWarning: It is highly recommended that you continue after downloading the recovery mnemonic phrases. If you already have, please continue.
onboarding.account.importError: Account could not be imported from your mnemonic phrases
onboarding.account.importMnemonicError: There was an error while reading the mnemonic phrases. {{error}}
onboarding.completed.title: That's All
onboarding.completed.description: The QRL Web3 Wallet is now ready for use. You can open it from the browser extensions.
home.addAccountsDescription: Create a new account or import an existing account.
account.shareInfo: You can share this account public address with anyone. Others need it to interact with you.
transfer.receiverDescription: Receiver's public address or QRNS name
transfer.errorInsufficientBalance: Insufficient QRL balance (amount + gas fee exceeds balance)
transfer.dialogPleaseWait: Please wait while the transaction completes.
transfer.dialogSigningDescription: Please wait while the transaction is signed. It will be broadcast automatically.
gasFee.label: Gas fee
gasFee.tierLowDescription: Base priority fee. May take longer to confirm.
txHistory.title: Transaction History
txDetail.title: Transaction Details
receive.title: Receive
chain.qrnsRegistryAddressDescription: Optional. Contract address of the QRNS registry on this chain.
chain.errorChainIdExists: A blockchain with the chain ID {{chainId}} already exist.
dapp.permissionDescription: Here is a request coming in. Go through the details and decide if it needs to be allowed.
dapp.permissionQuestion: Do you trust and want to allow this?
dapp.pleaseWait: Please wait. This may take a while.
dapp.addChain.title: Add new chain
dapp.addChain.description: Here is a request to add the following blockchain to the wallet.
dapp.addChain.question: Do you want to add this chain?
dapp.switchChain.title: Switch chain
dapp.switchChain.description: Here is a request to switch the current blockchain.
dapp.switchChain.question: Do you want to switch the chain?
dapp.switchChain.currentDescription: The currently active blockchain of the wallet
dapp.switchChain.toDescription: The blockchain to which the wallet will be switched to
dapp.watchAsset.description: Here is a request to add an ZRC20 token to the wallet.
dapp.watchAsset.question: Do you want to add this token?
dapp.walletSendCalls.title: Add transactions
dapp.walletSendCalls.description: Here is a request to add the following transactions to the blockchain.
dapp.walletSendCalls.question: Do you want to add transactions to chain?
dapp.walletSendCalls.alertDescription: This transaction will be delegated to a smart contract. You may check the status of the transaction using the wallet_getCallsStatus call.
dapp.sendTransaction.contractDeployDescr: This site wants to deploy a contract
dapp.sendTransaction.contractInteractDes: This site wants to interact with a contract
dapp.sendTransaction.transferQrlDescript: This site wants to send QRL
dapp.signature.title: Signature Request
dapp.signature.description: Review and sign the below message data
dapp.disconnectConfirm: Do you want to disconnect '{{origin}}' from wallet?
dapp.notConnectedDescription: QRL Web3 Wallet is not connected with this website.
dapp.connectedAccountsDescription: The following accounts are connected, and can interact with this website.
dapp.connectedBlockchainsDescription: The following blockchains are allowed to be used by this website.
dapp.scamWarning: There are token approval scams out there. Ensure you only connect your wallet with the websites you trust.
dapp.selectAccounts: Select the accounts you want this site to connect with
dapp.selectBlockchains: Select the blockchains you want this site to use
dapp.addChain.warning: Before adding the blockchain and making transactions, make sure you understand what you are doing.
chain.deleteChainConfirm: Do you want to delete the chain '{{name}}'?
chain.addUrlDescription: You may add URLs, and select one as the default URL.
chain.enterUrl: Enter the URL to be added
createAccount.title: Create a new account
createAccount.description: You can add a new account to this wallet. After creating the account, ensure you keep the account recovery phrases safe.
mnemonic.description: Don't lose this mnemonic phrases. Download it right now. You may need this someday to import or recover your new account {{address}}
mnemonic.continueWarning: It is highly recommended that you continue after downloading the recovery mnemonic phrases. If you already have, please continue.
importAccount.title: Import an existing account
importAccount.importFailed: Account could not be imported from the mnemonic phrases
importAccount.readError: There was an error while reading the mnemonic phrases.
tokens.hideConfirm: Do you want to hide '{{symbol}}' from wallet?
txDetail.speedUpDescription: This will re-submit your transaction with a higher gas fee to prioritize it. The new gas fee will be at least 10% higher than the original.
txDetail.cancelDescription: This will submit a self-send transaction (0 QRL to your own address) with the same nonce, effectively replacing the original transaction. You only pay gas for the empty transaction.
settings.title: Settings
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.security.title: Security & Privacy
settings.security.showBalanceDescription: We use CoinGecko API to display token prices. When disabled, no external API calls are made and no fiat values are shown.
settings.security.changePasswordDescript: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
settings.security.notificationsDescripti: Show a browser notification when a transaction is confirmed or fails.
settings.security.phishingDetectionDescr: Warn when a DApp connection request comes from a known phishing domain.
settings.preferences.title: Preferences
settings.data.title: Data
settings.data.exportDescription: Export encrypted keystores as a JSON backup file. No decrypted keys or passwords are included.
settings.about.title: About
contacts.title: Contacts
importToken.title: Import token
nft.contractDescription: Paste the NFT collection's contract address
nft.emptyGallery: No NFTs found in this collection. The contract may not support token enumeration.
ledger.connectDescription: Connect your Ledger device and open the QRL Zond app to import accounts.
ledger.stepUsb: Connect your Ledger device via USB
ledger.stepPin: Unlock your device with your PIN
ledger.stepApp: Open the QRL Zond app on your device
ledger.selectDescription: Choose which accounts you want to import from your Ledger device.
ledger.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one account to import
ledger.failedToLoadFromDevice: Failed to load accounts from device
ledger.successDescription: Your Ledger accounts have been imported successfully.
ledger.successInfo: You can now use these accounts to sign transactions. Your Ledger device will be required to approve each transaction.
phishing.warningDescription: This website has been flagged as a known phishing site. Interacting with it may result in loss of funds.
phishing.suspiciousDomain: This domain has been identified as suspicious.
phishing.proceedButton: I understand the risk, proceed anyway
